series_metadata.series_description: Journal for recording all warrants cancelled during a fiscal year. Records may include form ADM-277 used to cancel a State Warrant other than payroll; form ADM-914 is used for canceling payroll warrant only; and any supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
